diffs.diff:
--- a/grep_config.py
+++ b/grep_config.py
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+import os

+os.chdir('/opt/habitat-lab-src')

+with open("habitat-lab/habitat/config/benchmark/multi_agent/hssd_spot_human_social_nav.yaml", "r") as f:

+    lines = f.readlines()

+    for i, line in enumerate(lines):

+        if "success" in line.lower() or "terminate" in line.lower() or "measurements" in line.lower():

+            print(f"{i}: {line.strip()}")
